case_title: XIULING WU VS. ROCKY SZE-LOK YIP

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-19-2023 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,083.00 FILED BY WU, XIULING AS TO DEFENDANT YIP, ROCKY SZE-LOK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-19-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-19-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF XIULING WU IS PRESENT AND IS ASSISTED BY COURT PROVISIONAL MANDARIN INTERPRETER JEFFREY DINN. DEFENDANT ROCKY SZE-LOK YIP IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS JEAN WALTERS (MERCURY INSURANCE). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WU, XIULING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YIP, ROCKY SZE-LOK $5,083.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,158.00, THE COURT FINDS THE DEFENDANT DID NOT HAVE THE RIGHT OF WAY AND IS THEREFORE RESPONSIBLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY WU, XIULING YIP, ROCKY SZE-LOK

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-11-2023 - CONTINUED FOR CANTONESE INTERPRETER TO JUL-19-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF XIULING WU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROCKY SZE-LOK YIP IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS IN COURT TO PROVIDE A CANTONESE INTERPRETER. COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER IS NOT AVAILABLE FOR TODAY'S HEARING. CONTINUANCE DATE AGREED BY ALL PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CONTINUED TO PROVIDE A CANTONESE INTERPRETER (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT YIP, ROCKY SZE-LOK
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY WU, XIULING YIP, ROCKY SZE-LOK
